column5: Why
giongo: dog's sustained bark — vocal mimicry; alarm or greeting vocalization
giongo: cat's drawn-out meow — elongated feline cry; request or greeting
giongo: metallic sharp clash — door, chain, latch collision sound
giongo: low rolling rumble — thunder, boulders, heavy objects in motion
giongo: rapid heartbeat — heart rhythm under emotional stress
giongo: heavy streaming flow — rain pouring, water rushing; sustained sound
giongo: dismissive shooing sound — chasing away with voiced gesture
giongo: gentle intermittent trickle — small water flow; light dripping
giongo: single isolated plop — one drip; also describes lonely single item
giongo: reflected light sparkle — stars, jewels, water surface; visual shimmer
giongo: dry metallic rattling — keys, coins, small items clicking together
giongo: secretive muffled movement — sneaking or hushed conversation
giongo: small light footsteps — rhythmic patter of children or small animals
giongo: repeated short dry cough — involuntary respiratory hacking
giongo: low indistinct mumbling — barely audible speech; talking to oneself
giongo: soft fluttering descent — leaves, petals, snowflakes drifting down
giongo: crisp brittle crackle — dry fresh food or wrapping breaking
giongo: airy floating lightness — feathers, clouds; soft lifting sensation
giongo: light rapid flapping — bird wings, fan, quick pattering feet
giongo: metallic jingling cascade — coins, chains, jewelry clinking together
giongo: soaking wet saturation — completely drenched; water-logged state
giongo: rising bubbles — liquid boiling or fish blowing air
giongo: noisy heavy flapping — rushed movement; chaos and commotion
giongo: rhythmic footsteps on hard ground — marching, crunching surface
giongo: tearing or electric rip — paper tearing, static shock, current
giongo: electric sparking crackle — static discharge, fire popping
giongo: sharp stinging tingle — spice on tongue, static shock, pins-and-needles
giongo: gritty grinding friction — sandpaper, gravel; unpleasant rough contact
giongo: prolonged hissing pressure release — steam, gas; sustained sibilant
giongo: liquid slurping intake — drawing up through straw; eating noodles
giongo: paper crumpling and wrinkling — soft material compressed
giongo: gentle soft rustling — fabric or leaves with light contact
giongo: startled sudden sound — shock vocalized; surprise response
giongo: slow thick simmering — dense liquid boiling; stew or heavy soup
giongo: casual nasal humming or grunt — low affirming or thoughtful vocalization
giongo: rapid light footsteps — quick short steps; small child or animal running
giongo: light hollow pops — drum tap, bouncing ball, gentle tapping
giongo: heavy rhythmic knocking — pounding on door; taiko drum beat
giongo: smooth effortless sliding — silk, rope; resistance-free motion
giongo: vigorous rough scrubbing — washing, polishing; friction cleaning
